objective: Generous image pipeline for opencodex Anthropic adapter, 4 chained work-phases: (wp1) Phase-0 doc cycle — devlog/260714_image_normalization_pipeline/ with 000_plan.md, 001_prior_art.md (full session research: Claude Code corpus mechanisms, proxy survey, Bun.Image probe), diff-level decade docs 010 (Rule 1b base64-length unit fix), 020 (tiered normalization pipeline: Bun.Image, age-tier pyramid 2000/1024/700px, hash+tier LRU cache, extreme guards), 030 (upstream 413 tightened-retry). (wp2) execute 010. (wp3) execute 020 with runtime Bun.Image coverage probe first. (wp4) execute 030. Gates per code phase: activation-grounded tests, full bun test + tsc green, reviewer verdict recorded. Sol dispatch at agent discretion with direct-audit fallback.

workPhases.title: Phase-0 doc cycle: research documentation + diff-level roadmap

tasks.title: Guard comparison unit fix + B3/B4 test adjustment
